ancestorTitles: EC1: Ruler dies in combat (ruler is army.generalId)
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC1: Ruler dies in combat (ruler is army.generalId) removes the ruler general from world.generals and clears army.generalId, but leaves orphan RulerState
assertionResults.title: removes the ruler general from world.generals and clears army.generalId, but leaves orphan RulerState

ancestorTitles: EC2: Heir is also an army general (dual role)
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC2: Heir is also an army general (dual role) installs heir as new ruler when heir is currently leading an army
assertionResults.title: installs heir as new ruler when heir is currently leading an army

ancestorTitles: EC3: Governor defects → economy phase handles safely
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC3: Governor defects → economy phase handles safely runs economyPhase without errors after governor defects in characterLifecycle
assertionResults.title: runs economyPhase without errors after governor defects in characterLifecycle

ancestorTitles: EC4: Multiple realms split in same tick (dictionary order)
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC4: Multiple realms split in same tick (dictionary order) handles two consecutive splitRealm calls without ID conflicts
assertionResults.title: handles two consecutive splitRealm calls without ID conflicts

ancestorTitles: EC5: Empty character pool → recruitment replenishes
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC5: Empty character pool → recruitment replenishes recruitmentPhase generates new characters even when realm has zero existing characters
assertionResults.title: recruitmentPhase generates new characters even when realm has zero existing characters

ancestorTitles: EC6: Combat death takes priority over defection (phase ordering)
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC6: Combat death takes priority over defection (phase ordering) characterLifecycle does not emit characterDefected for a general already removed by combat
assertionResults.title: characterLifecycle does not emit characterDefected for a general already removed by combat

ancestorTitles: EC7: Multiple succession crises in same tick (deterministic order, single player modal)
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC7: Multiple succession crises in same tick (deterministic order, single player modal) emits successionCrisis events for both player and AI realms in dictionary order
assertionResults.title: emits successionCrisis events for both player and AI realms in dictionary order

ancestorTitles: EC8: Realm splits while in war (primary inherits, secondary does not)
assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC8: Realm splits while in war (primary inherits, secondary does not) only the primary new realm inherits the war with another realm
assertionResults.title: only the primary new realm inherits the war with another realm

assertionResults.fullName: M5 edge case integration tests EC9: aiPersonality=aggressive_random migrates to ruler.personality=schemer v2 fixture with aggressive_random produces v3 ruler with personality=schemer
assertionResults.title: v2 fixture with aggressive_random produces v3 ruler with personality=schemer
